message:
chore(beads): sync local issue tracking state

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect current task progress and state
from multi-agent development sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -742,6 +742,7 @@
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zumu","title":"Reduce flakiness in production Playwright smoke tests","description":"Playwright production smoke tests used waitForLoadState("networkidle") directly, which can be flaky on pages with long-lived background requests (analytics, etc). Add a helper that waits for domcontentloaded and then attempts networkidle with a short timeout, without failing if the page never becomes fully idle.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"","created_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:18.185815Z","updated_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:46.273323Z","closed_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:46.273323Z","close_reason":"Implemented waitForPageSettled helper and replaced strict networkidle waits in production smoke tests.","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zumu","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-dvt.6","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:18.187139Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zv33","title":"Random deep code exploration audit (Round 3)","description":"Random audit pass: trace manifest generator + installer security paths, then fix any concrete issues found (reserve files before edits).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2025-12-25T09:37:22.568240Z","updated_at":"2025-12-25T09:54:51.415794Z","closed_at":"2025-12-25T09:54:51.415794Z","close_reason":"Fixed manifest generator verified_installer piping for bash/sh args (commit 5b0c67a); bun test + type-check passed.","compaction_level":0}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zwg3","title":"TASK: Add final completion certificate to onboard","description":"# TASK: Add final completion certificate to onboard

## Context
When user completes all 9 lessons, show a special completion screen.

## Proposed Screen
```
╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│                                                             │
│  🏆 ACFS ONBOARDING COMPLETE!                               │
│                                                             │
│  Congratulations! You've completed all 9 lessons.           │
│                                                             │
│  You're now ready to:                                       │
│  • Launch AI agents with cc, cod, gmi                       │
│  • Manage sessions with ntm                                 │
│  • Search code with rg                                      │
│  • Use the full flywheel workflow                           │
│                                                             │
│  Next steps:                                                │
│  • Run 'acfs info' for quick reference                      │
│  • Run 'acfs cheatsheet' for all commands                   │
│  • Start a project with 'ntm new myproject && cc'           │
│                                                             │
│  Completed: $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')                       │
│                                                             │
│  Happy coding! 🚀                                            │
│                                                             │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

## Implementation

### Store Completion Timestamp
```bash
# In onboard_progress.json
{
  "completed_lessons": [0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8],
  "completed_at": "2025-01-15T14:30:00Z"
}
```

### Trigger Condition
Show when:
- User just completed lesson 8 (last)
- OR user runs `onboard` when all lessons complete

### Re-access
User can re-run `onboard` to see certificate again.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Certificate shown on final completion
- [ ] Completion timestamp stored
- [ ] Shows next steps recommendations
- [ ] Accessible by running onboard again
- [ ] Celebration emoji/styling","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2025-12-22T19:59:54.304099Z","updated_at":"2025-12-22T20:35:03.037145Z","closed_at":"2025-12-22T20:35:03.037145Z","close_reason":"View Certificate menu option added to onboard. Shows trophy option when all 9 lessons complete.","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zwg3","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-kyhv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T20:00:16.782605Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-19u2","title":"Fix ms --version failure (meta_skill needs releases)","description":"## Summary
The wizard checks for 'ms' (Meta Skill) command but meta_skill has no GitHub releases, causing ms --version to fail.

## Context
- GitHub Issue #64 reports ms --version fails
- meta_skill repo exists but has 0 releases
- Need to create release workflow for meta_skill

## Requirements
1. Create GitHub Actions release workflow for meta_skill
2. Build and publish binary on tag push
3. Update ACFS wizard to handle missing ms gracefully OR
4. Ensure ms is always available via releases

## Technical Approach
Option A: Create meta_skill release workflow (preferred)
- Add .github/workflows/release.yml to meta_skill repo
- Cross-compile for linux/macos/windows
- Publish to GitHub releases

Option B: Make ACFS wizard more graceful
- Check if ms exists before running --version
- Provide helpful error message with install instructions

## Files to Create/Modify
- /data/projects/meta_skill/.github/workflows/release.yml (if Option A)
- wizard.sh or equivalent in ACFS (if Option B)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ms --version works after fresh install
- [ ] Wizard doesn't fail on missing ms
- [ ] Clear install instructions if ms missing","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-23T05:03:38.599549578Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T06:49:44.188816554Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1t25","title":"Checksums: add apr/ms/pt/srps/xf to security.sh + checksums.yaml","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:47:26.339355289Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:51:40.548322041Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T06:51:40.546652557Z","close_reason":"Added missing KNOWN_INSTALLERS + checksums for apr/ms/pt/srps/xf","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1t25","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-go4z","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:47:26.407743585Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2a8k","title":"ACFS update should self-update first","description":"The acfs update command should update ACFS itself (git pull) BEFORE updating any other components. Currently no self-update happens.

Critical because:
1. Bug fixes in update.sh won't apply without manual git pull
2. Security fixes in checksums.yaml won't apply
3. New tools in manifest won't be discovered

Fix: Add update_acfs_self() as FIRST operation that does git fetch/pull and re-execs if update.sh changed.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-21T21:16:03.928848634Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T21:46:31.334103730Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T21:46:31.334032095Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critical","self-update","update"]}
 {"id":"bd-2fov","title":"JFP: Add TLDR entry + stats alignment","description":"Add JeffreysPrompts (jfp) to the TLDR quick reference data.\n\nScope:\n- Update apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts: add a JFP tool entry (prefer core category) with description, synergies (ms/apr), and commands.\n- Update tldrPageData hero description/stats/supportingDescription to match actual tool counts after adding JFP.\n\nValidation:\n- bun run build (apps/web) if convenient; otherwise note not run.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T09:45:27.345267808Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T09:50:08.093983957Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T09:50:08.093915138Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
